tasks.label: Flash(SSH)
tasks.command: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; SERIAL="$CMSIS_DAP_SERIAL_NUMBER"; echo "Using CMSIS-DAP serial: $SERIAL"; ssh ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST} "sudo openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -c 'adapter serial $SERIAL' -f target/${PICO_UPLOAD_TARGET}.cfg -c 'adapter speed 5000' -c 'program ${PICO_REMOTE_PATH}/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf verify reset exit'"

tasks.label: Probe(Upload)
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; SERIAL="$CMSIS_DAP_SERIAL_NUMBER"; echo "Using CMSIS-DAP serial: $SERIAL"; ${userHome}/.pico-sdk/openocd/0.12.0+dev/openocd -s ${userHome}/.pico-sdk/openocd/0.12.0+dev/scripts -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -c "adapter serial $SERIAL" -f target/${PICO_UPLOAD_TARGET}.cfg -c "adapter speed 5000" -c "program \"${workspaceFolder}/build/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf\" verify reset exit" && if [ -t 1 ]; then printf "$(tput setaf 2)Probe serial: $SERIAL$(tput sgr0)\n"; printf "$(tput setaf 2)Flash USB successful$(tput sgr0)\n"; else echo "Probe serial: $SERIAL"; echo "Flash USB successful"; fi

tasks.label: Upload .elf(SSH)
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; scp "${workspaceFolder}/build/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf" ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST}:${PICO_REMOTE_PATH}/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf && if [ -t 1 ]; then printf "$(tput setaf 2)Upload successful$(tput sgr0)\n"; else echo "Upload successful"; fi

tasks.label: Delete .elf(SSH)
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; ssh ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST} "rm -f ${PICO_REMOTE_PATH}/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf && if [ -t 1 ]; then printf \"$(tput setaf 2)Delete successful$(tput sgr0)\\n\"; else echo \"Delete successful\"; fi"

tasks.label: Debug Serv
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; SERIAL="$CMSIS_DAP_SERIAL_NUMBER"; echo "Using CMSIS-DAP serial: $SERIAL"; ssh ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST} "sudo openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -c \"adapter serial $SERIAL\" -f target/${PICO_UPLOAD_TARGET}.cfg -c \"adapter speed 5000\" -c \"bindto 0.0.0.0\" -c \"gdb_port 3333\""

tasks.label: Kill Serv
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; ssh ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST} "echo shutdown | nc 127.0.0.1 4444 || sudo pkill -f openocd"

tasks.label: SSH Upload
args: set -e; . "${workspaceFolder}/build/project_configuration.sh"; ssh ${PICO_REMOTE_USER}@${PICO_REMOTE_HOST} "sudo openocd -f interface/cmsis-dap.cfg -f target/${PICO_UPLOAD_TARGET}.cfg -c \"adapter speed 5000\" -c \"program ${PICO_REMOTE_PATH}/${PICO_FIRMWARE_NAME}.elf verify reset exit\""
